metadata.name: Tara
metadata.primary_role: Queen of Kishkindha / Wife of Vali / Wisest woman among the Vanaras / Later wife of Sugriva
metadata.ethnicity_cultural_context: Vanara (divine monkey race), Queen of Kishkindha
metadata.divine_origin: Daughter of Sushena the divine physician — blessed with medicinal knowledge and prophetic wisdom

timelines.context_description: Tara warns Vali not to fight Sugriva again (suspecting Rama's alliance), and after Vali's death delivers one of the most powerful grief-speeches in the epic.

physical_appearance.skin_tone: Soft silver-white fur with a pale golden undertone — uniquely beautiful among Vanaras, delicate and luminous
physical_appearance.height: Graceful and tall for a female Vanara, elegant bearing combining queenly dignity with simian grace
physical_appearance.build: Slender and graceful Vanara feminine form, strong but not bulky, graceful long arms and an elegant tail
physical_appearance.facial_features: Beautiful feminine simian face with large deep wise brown eyes that see the future, delicate features for a Vanara, expression of worried wisdom before Vali's fight, devastating grief after, long eyelashes, gentle mouth
physical_appearance.hair: Soft silver-white fur around her face like a pale halo, neatly groomed, longer and silkier than male Vanaras
physical_appearance.distinguishing_marks: Known as the wisest of all Vanaras — her counsel was always right (Vali's fatal mistake was ignoring her), her grief over Vali's body is one of the most moving scenes in the epic

wardrobe_and_adornments.clothing: Elegant queen's garments — a draped golden and white cloth, simpler than human queen's saris but distinctively regal for a Vanara
wardrobe_and_adornments.jewelry: A delicate golden crown, flower garlands, simple gold bangles and earrings — elegant but not ostentatious
wardrobe_and_adornments.weapons_carried: None — her wisdom and words are her weapons, she also possesses her father Sushena's medicinal knowledge

audio_and_voice_characteristics.tone: Wise, prophetic, deeply emotional — ranges from calm sage-like counsel to devastating raw grief, one of the great tragic voices of the epic
audio_and_voice_characteristics.pitch: Clear mezzo-soprano with unusual depth and resonance, carries prophetic authority, shatters into raw grief when Vali dies
audio_and_voice_characteristics.speech_style: Speaks with sage-like wisdom and authority that even kings listen to, her warnings are specific and prescient, her grief-speech over Vali's body is delivered in powerful poetic verse, she addresses Rama with respectful but sharp moral questioning
audio_and_voice_characteristics.emotional_baseline: Prophetic wisdom, deep love, devastating grief, the complex emotions of a woman who was always right but never heeded

cinematic_generation_prompts.visual_prompt: Emotionally powerful cinematic shot of Vanara Queen Tara, age 35. Soft silver-white fur with golden undertone, beautiful feminine simian face with deep wise brown eyes. Delicate golden crown, flower garlands, golden garments. Kneeling over the fallen body of Vali, face contorted in devastating grief, tears streaming. Forest clearing with dramatic light. 3D Pixar style, emotionally intense, photorealistic, 8k.
cinematic_generation_prompts.audio_prompt: A clear female mezzo-soprano with prophetic authority. Ranges from calm sage-like wisdom to devastating raw grief. Age approximately 35 years.
